_focus: Dash. 4-tile gaps you clear by dashing mid-jump, long flat runs that reward a ground dash, and Chargers (the dashing enemy) as the recurring threat.
_pacing: 0-7 dash corridor warm-up · 8-23 first dash-gaps + a Charger · 24-45 plat chain + mortar with a weapon block · 46-62 faster dash-gaps · 63-77 sprint to the flag over one last leap.
